subject: english
description: go → went のように不規則に変化する動詞の過去形を覚えます。

questions.question: I ___ to school yesterday. (go)
questions.explanation: goの過去形は went です

questions.question: I ___ breakfast this morning. (eat)
questions.explanation: eatの過去形は ate です

questions.question: I ___ a letter yesterday. (write)
questions.explanation: writeの過去形は wrote です

questions.question: I ___ fast yesterday. (run)
questions.explanation: runの過去形は ran です

questions.question: I ___ a dog when I was young. (have)
questions.explanation: haveの過去形は had です

questions.question: I ___ books yesterday. (read)
questions.explanation: readの過去形は read（発音は「レッド」）です

questions.question: I ___ a bird this morning. (see)
questions.explanation: seeの過去形は saw です

questions.question: I ___ the bus yesterday. (take)
questions.explanation: takeの過去形は took です

questions.question: I ___ home early yesterday. (come)
questions.explanation: comeの過去形は came です

questions.question: I ___ a cake last week. (make)
questions.explanation: makeの過去形は made です
